questionText: You want to write your name on Microsoft Word. What do you do first?
optionB: Click on the white page area and start typing

questionText: You finished typing your name and want to keep it safe. What do you do?
You made a spelling mistake while typing. What is the easiest way to fix it?
optionC: Press Backspace to delete the mistake and retype it correctly

questionText: You want your heading to look bigger than the other words. What should you do?
optionB: Make the heading text size larger

questionText: You want to start writing on a new line. Which key do you press?
You want to write a sentence but all your letters are coming out as CAPITALS. Which key do you press to fix this?
You typed a sentence and want to make one word darker and thicker. What do you click?
You want to put a space between two words that are joined together like 'MicrosoftWord'. What key do you press between them?
You want to type the title of your work at the top of the page. Where do you click before typing?
optionA: At the bottom of the page
optionB: In the middle of the page
optionC: At the top of the page

questionText: You have finished typing a short story and your teacher wants a printed copy. What button do you click?
You drew a line under some words by mistake. How do you remove it?
optionB: Select the words and click the U button to turn off underline

questionText: You want to add your school name and your name at the top of every page automatically. Which feature do you use?
You want to type a list of your favorite fruits with each fruit on its own line. What key do you press after each fruit?
You accidentally deleted a word you needed. What do you press to bring it back?
You want to make some words have a line under them to make them stand out. Which button do you click?
Your teacher asks you to change the text in your work to size 14. Where do you make this change?
optionB: The Font Size box on the toolbar

questionText: You want to copy your name and paste it somewhere else in the document. What do you press to copy it?
You finished copying your name. What do you press to paste it in the new place?
You want to change the color of your title to red. What should you do?
optionB: Select the title text then click the Font Color button and choose red

questionText: You want to count how many words you have typed in your document. Where do you look?
optionC: The bottom bar of Microsoft Word which shows Word Count
